top_signals.title: What founders need to unlearn about fundraising and the one question no one thinks to ask investors
top_signals.summary: At SCALE Summit on 22 April, a panel of EIS and SEIS investors came together to share exactly what they look for, and where founders are missing a trick. Here are the takeaways for your next raise. Fundraising is usually talked about as something you do when you need money, as if it’s a phase [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
